title: Gifts&Gadgets Reading Mini Lamp Light Led Book Clip (Black)
features: Led Lamp Mini Reading Gift Light
description: Mini Reading Lamp is made of premium ABS material- plastic which is durable and wear-resistant. It is lightweight and portable, so You can carry it anywhere and anytime. The foldable design makes it super easy and convenient to carry use. Each lamp has an on/off button to operate and an adjustable arm. The arm has a clip allowing the lamp to clip onto pages and the base can be detached whilst the lamp is clipped into a book. These battery operated Mini Reading Lamps contain a bright white bulb that is prefect for reading. - Requires 3 LR411.5V batteries (included). - LED Book Clip Easy to Fasten, - A Great Gift For Any Bookworm. Packaged Dimensions: 16cm x 10cm x 5cm
